title: Collapsible details component with smooth animations and theme support
purpose: Provides a reusable React component that renders expandable/collapsible sections with smooth CSS transitions, chevron icon rotation, and theme-aware styling for both light and dark modes.
module_context: Exports two components: ChevronIcon for rendering the toggle icon, CollapsibleSummary for defining summary content, and CollapsibleDetails which is the main component implementing the collapsible behavior with animation and accessibility features.

steps.content: Render an SVG chevron icon element.
Apply CSS classes for size, transition, and rotation based on the open state.
Accept and return the children prop directly without modification.
Set the component's display name to 'CollapsibleSummary'.
Initialize state for tracking open/closed state, measured height, and transition status.
Set up a callback to update the measured height of the content area.
Use a resize observer to monitor changes in content area dimensions.
Handle click events on the summary button to toggle the open state.
Extract summary content and child elements from the component's children.
Render the summary button with chevron icon and appropriate styling.
Render the collapsible content area with dynamic height and transition effects.
Set the transitioning state to true to trigger animation.
Toggle the open state of the component.
Measure and update the scroll height of the content area.
Check if the transition event target is the component's root element.
IF the event target matches the component, set transitioning state to false.
